headline: 4 Stocks to Grab as Manufacturing Sector Makes Solid Rebound in Q2
summary: MSM, AIT, HUBB and TRMB stand out as U.S. manufacturing rebounds in 2H, backed by stronger industrial output, AI-driven demand and easing inflation.
